enum_values.name: SPLICE_TYPE_LAP_RIGHT
enum_values.summary: The first (left) bar extends over the second (right) bar.

enum_values.name: SPLICE_TYPE_LAP_LEFT
enum_values.summary: The second (right) bar extends over the first (left) bar.

enum_values.name: SPLICE_TYPE_LAP_BOTH
enum_values.summary: Both bars extend over each other.

enum_values.name: SPLICE_TYPE_MUFF
enum_values.summary: The bar ends are joined with a muff.

enum_values.name: SPLICE_TYPE_WELD
enum_values.summary: The bar ends are joined with a weld.
